records.question: Which players named Dennis Nutt who are guards from TCU were born in the USA and have a race of W?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.race = 'W' AND players.birthcountry = 'USA' AND players.pos = 'G' AND players.college = 'TCU' AND players.firstname = 'Dennis' AND players.lastname = 'Nutt'
records.pred_sql: SELECT playerID FROM players WHERE firstName = 'Dennis' AND lastName = 'Nutt' AND pos = 'G' AND college = 'TCU' AND birthCountry = 'USA' AND race = 'W'

records.question: Who are the players with the last name Netolicky who played in the ABA, had a last season of at least 0.0, and have a death date exactly on 0000-00-00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.lastname = 'Netolicky' AND awards_players.lgid = 'ABA' AND players.lastseason >= 0.0 AND players.deathdate = '0000-00-00'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.playerID FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.lastName = 'Netolicky' AND T2.lgID = 'ABA' AND T1.lastseason >= 0.0 AND T1.deathDate = '0000-00-00'

records.question: Which players have the last name exactly Vap?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.lastname = 'Vap'
records.pred_sql: SELECT playerID FROM players WHERE lastName = 'Vap'

records.question: What players have the middle name Harding and have received awards as well as been selected as All-Stars?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE players.middlename = 'Harding'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.playerID FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T3 ON T1.playerID = T3.playerID WHERE T1.middleName = 'Harding'

records.question: Which players have the position C, were born in the USA, are named Chuck, started playing in season 0.0 or later, and died on or before 2012-06-07?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.pos = 'C' AND players.hscountry = 'USA' AND players.usefirst = 'Chuck' AND players.firstseason >= 0.0 AND players.deathdate <= '2012-06-07'
records.pred_sql: SELECT playerID FROM players WHERE pos = 'C' AND birthCountry = 'USA' AND firstName = 'Chuck' AND firstseason >= 0 AND deathDate <= '2012-06-07'

records.question: Which players named Timothy Theodore from ISV have won the All-Defensive Second Team award and recorded at most 7 offensive rebounds, at most 1 steal, and no more than 0 free throws made in all-star games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE awards_players.award = 'All-Defensive Second Team' AND players.firstname = 'Timothy' AND players.hscountry = 'ISV' AND player_allstar.o_rebounds <= 7.0 AND player_allstar.steals <= 1.0 AND players.middlename = 'Theodore' AND player_allstar.ft_made <= 0.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.playerID FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T3 ON T1.playerID = T3.playerID WHERE T1.firstName = 'Timothy' AND T1.lastName = 'Theodore' AND T1.birthCountry = 'ISV' AND T2.award = 'All-Defensive Second Team' AND T3.o_rebounds <= 7 AND T3.steals <= 1 AND T3.ft_made <= 0

records.question: Who are the players from UNLV whose position is exactly F and have received any awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.college = 'UNLV' AND players.pos = 'F'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.playerID
FROM players AS T1
INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2
  ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID
WHERE
  T1.college = 'UNLV' AND T1.pos = 'F'

records.question: Who are the players whose usefirst name is exactly Oscar and whose first season is at least 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.usefirst = 'Oscar' AND players.firstseason >= 0.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT playerID FROM players WHERE useFirst = 'Oscar' AND firstseason >= 0.0

records.question: What players named John J. who were born in the USA, went to Bridgeport High School and Ohio State, and have won the All-NBA Second Team award but have no recorded death date are there?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE awards_players.award = 'All-NBA Second Team' AND players.college = 'Ohio State' AND players.birthcountry = 'USA' AND players.usefirst = 'John' AND players.middlename = 'J.' AND players.deathdate = '0000-00-00' AND players.highschool = 'Bridgeport'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.playerID FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.firstName = 'John' AND T1.middleName = 'J.' AND T1.birthCountry = 'USA' AND T1.highSchool = 'Bridgeport High School' AND T1.college = 'Ohio State' AND T2.award = 'All-NBA Second Team' AND T1.deathDate IS NULL

records.question: Who are the players with the middle name Verner Agerskov, born in the USA, and who attended high school in MN, that have both awards and All-Star appearances?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE players.middlename = 'Verner Agerskov' AND players.hsstate = 'MN' AND players.birthcountry = 'USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.playerID FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T3 ON T1.playerID = T3.playerID WHERE T1.middleName = 'Verner Agerskov' AND T1.birthCountry = 'USA' AND T1.hsState = 'MN' GROUP BY T1.playerID
